message:
chore(core,deps,beads): add rollback diagnostic instrumentation, update deps and issue metadata

crates/fsqlite/src/lib.rs:
- Add sqlite_master queries before BEGIN and after ROLLBACK in the
  transaction rollback test, with eprintln tracing. This captures
  schema-level state at both checkpoints to aid debugging of MVCC
  pager/vdbe interactions during rollback, specifically to verify
  that schema metadata remains consistent across transaction
  boundaries.

Cargo.lock:
- Refresh dependency versions (88 insertions, 81 deletions across
  169 changed lines). Routine lockfile update from upstream crate
  version bumps.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update 5 issue records with refreshed metadata (status, timestamps,
  close reasons) reflecting recent task completions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
